name: datacloud-code-mode-mcp
description: Salesforce Data Cloud MCP server with Code Mode (search + execute)

ALLOW_WRITES.description: Set to 'true' to allow mutating API calls through execute()

SALESFORCE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.description: Connected App client ID for OAuth web flow

SALESFORCE_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI.description: OAuth callback URL — must match the deployed Heroku app URL + /oauth/callback

CDP_AUTH_FLOW.description: Auth mode: auto | access_token | client_credentials | username_password | oauth

CDP_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Salesforce session/access token (for access_token auth mode)
